scriptLines:
query: 'select
fjb.*,
fulv.Descr as FieldSupervisorName
from ODS.LP_FHI_job_Jobs fjb left join ODS.LP_FHI_ulv_UserLookupValues fulv on fjb.job_user_16=fulv.id ',

query: 'select 
pjb.id
,pjb.lds_id
,pjb.cst_id
,pjb.ils_id
,pjb.contractid
,pjb.productid
,pjb.GrossAmount
,pjb.jbs_id
,pjb.brp_id
,pjb.pds_id
,pjb.cmt_id
,pjb.Commission
,pjb.ins_installer1
,pjb.ins_installer2
,pjb.measuredby
,pjb.ContractDate
,pjb.CancelDate
,pjb.HoldDate
,pjb.hld_id
,pjb.mls_id
,pjb.slr_id
,pjb.slr_id2
,pjb.slr_split
,CASE WHEN pjb.fns_id='' THEN 'C' ELSE pjb.fns_id END as fns_id
,pjb.fns_id2
,pjb.fns_id3
,pjb.ProductID2
,pjb.ProductID3
,pjb.ProductID4
,pjb.pws_id
,pjb.vnd_id
,pjb.vnd_id2
,pjb.vnd_id3
,pjb.vnd_id4
,pjb.GrossBatched
,pjb.BatchFlag
,pjb.GrossBatched2
,pjb.BatchFlag2
,pjb.StatusDate
,pjb.BudgetCost
,pjb.ActualCost
,pjb.FundedDate
,pjb.FundedAmount
,pjb.ParAmount
,pjb.FinCo_ID
,pjb.FinAmount
,pjb.FinMonths
,pjb.FinCrLimit
,pjb.FinPlan_ID
,pjb.FinApproved
,pjb.FinRate
,pjb.FinTerms
,pjb.FinExpire
,pjb.FinFee
,pjb.FinHomeValue
,pjb.FinParty1Employer
,pjb.FinParty1Income
,pjb.FinParty1CreditScore
,pjb.FinParty1Name
,pjb.FinParty1EmpPhone
,pjb.FinParty2Employer
,pjb.FinParty2Income
,pjb.FinParty2CreditScore
,pjb.FinParty2Name
,pjb.FinParty2EmpPhone
,pjb.FinDtApproved
,pjb.job_user_1
,pjb.job_user_2
,pjb.job_user_3
,pjb.job_user_4
,pjb.job_user_5
,pjb.job_user_6
,pjb.job_user_7
,pjb.job_user_8
,pjb.job_user_9
,pjb.job_user_10
,pjb.job_user_11
,pjb.job_user_12
,pjb.job_user_13
,pjb.job_user_14
,pjb.job_user_15
,pjb.job_user_16
,pjb.job_user_17
,pjb.job_user_18
,pjb.job_user_19
,pjb.job_user_20
,pjb.LastModifiedBy
,pjb.LastModifiedOn
,pjb.USN
,pjb.JobNotes
,pjb.FinNotes
,pjb.QBJobRefID
,pjb.QBJobDate
,pjb.QBJobBalance
,pjb.ins_installer3
,pjb.ins_installer4
,pjb.JobNetAmt
,pjb.resource1
,pjb.resource2
,pjb.resource3
,pjb.resource4
,pjb.resource5
,pjb.resource6
,pjb.resource7
,pjb.resource8,
pulv.Descr as FieldSupervisorName
from ODS.LP_PBC_job_Jobs pjb left join ODS.LP_PBC_ulv_UserLookupValues pulv on pjb.job_user_18=pulv.id ',
query: 'select sjb.*, \r\nsulv.Descr as FieldSupervisorName\r\nfrom ODS.LP_SWR_job_Jobs sjb left join ODS.LP_SWR_ulv_UserLookupValues sulv on sjb.job_user_19=sulv.id',

query: 'Select j.*,u.Descr as EngineerID,f.SquareFootage,f.ActualSQF,a.Description as InstallationType 
from ODS.LP_CTA_job_jobs j left join (Select id,Descr from ODS.LP_CTA_ulv_UserLookupValues where UserField='J16') u on j.job_user_16 = u.id
left join (Select job_id,sum(SquareFootage) as SquareFootage,sum(ActualSQF) as ActualSQF from ODS.LP_CTA_fif_FlakeInformation group by job_id) f on j.id=f.job_id
left join (Select DISTINCT i.job_id,t.Description from ODS.LP_CTA_ist_InstallationInfo i 
left join ODS.LP_CTA_ist_InstallationType t on i.InstallationType=t.id where i.InstallationType is not null and i.InstallationType!=0
and i.job_id not in ('304957','306454','306939')) a on j.id=a.job_id',
setPurchaserAndARIssueFHI, addOpCoNamePBC, addOpCoNameRTW, addOpCoNameMAC, addOpCoNameSWR, addOpCoNameHSI, addOpCoNameMXH, addOpCoNameCTA union(byName: true)~> unionAllOpCos
